positive: A stylized, high-contrast emblem of celestial flora. Depict glowing bioluminescent vines intertwined with minimalist geometric constellations. The main subject is a symmetrical, mandala-like grouping featuring crescent moons and stardust scattering over deep indigo and sapphire hues, accented by glowing gold line art. The overall composition must be highly detailed but maintain clean, solid silhouettes suitable for screen printing on fabric. Studio lighting, symmetrical composition, clean vector aesthetic, tarot card illustration style, cosmic botanical art, perfect for apparel print.
